overview: Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines is a vibrant city located in the Île-de-France region of France, just southwest of Paris. Known for its modern architecture and green spaces, it plays a significant role as a residential and business hub. The city is part of the greater Paris metropolitan area, making it an attractive destination for both locals and visitors who seek a blend of urban amenities and natural beauty.
history: Founded in the 1960s as part of a planned urban development project, Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines was designed to accommodate the growing population of the Paris region. Its development has been pivotal in shaping suburban life around Paris.
economy: Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines boasts a diverse economy, with key industries including technology, retail, and services. The city is home to numerous businesses and startups, contributing to its status as a significant economic center within the Paris metropolitan area.
tourism: Tourism in Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines offers a mix of cultural and recreational activities. Visitors can explore attractions such as the Parc Naturel Régional de la Haute Vallée de Chevreuse, enjoy water sports at the Étang de Saint-Quentin, or visit the impressive Palace of Versailles, located nearby. The city also hosts various events and festivals throughout the year.
best_places: Parc Naturel Régional de la Haute Vallée de Chevreuse

weather_summary: Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines experiences mild, rainy winters and warm summers, making it suitable for year-round visits.

faqs.question: What time zone is Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines in?
faqs.answer: Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines is in the Europe/Paris time zone.

faqs.question: Does Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines observe daylight saving time?
faqs.answer: Yes, Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines observes daylight saving time, typically from the last Sunday in March to the last Sunday in October.

faqs.question: What is the population of Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines?
faqs.answer: The population of Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines is approximately 146,598.

faqs.question: When does sunrise typically occur in Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines?
faqs.answer: Sunrise in Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines typically occurs between 6:30 AM and 8:30 AM, depending on the season.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines?
faqs.answer: The best time to visit Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines is during the spring and early fall when the weather is pleasant and outdoor activities are abundant.
